default_only.description: Indicates whether to only include the default version for the RDS engine.

engine.description: Specifies the type of the database engine, such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.

has_major_target.description: Indicates if there is a major version upgrade available for the engine.

has_minor_target.description: Indicates if there is a minor version upgrade available for the engine.

include_all.description: Determines whether to include all available versions for the RDS engine.

latest.description: Indicates whether to select the latest version available for the RDS engine.

preferred_major_targets.description: A list of preferred major versions to which the engine can be upgraded.

preferred_upgrade_targets.description: A list of preferred versions for upgrading the engine.

preferred_versions.description: A list of preferred specific versions of the engine to be used.
